calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: ARC-062 x MECH-260 2x2 factorial monomodal-collapse falsifier on bipartite SD-054
items.note: 2x2 factorial of (use_gated_policy, use_dacc) with MECH-260 anti-recency suppression_weight=0.5; tests whether 543c inert-gating reflects an actual substrate failure or just the absence of cluster-wiring. Pre-registered cross-arm criteria D1-D4 (D1 dACC-alone effect; D2 dACC adds to gated; D3 gated adds to dACC; D4 543c null replication). PASS=D2 AND D3. FAIL with D1-only routes to ARC-062 substrate-rationale review. FAIL all-D-null routes to option 2 head-input augmentation (2026-05-11 decision-log). dACC sub-weights other than suppression left at default 0.0 to isolate MECH-260 anti-recency. All other 543c config preserved (SD-054 bipartite layout, world_states[1] fix, P0=40/P1=60/P2=8). Probe-gate kept as diagnostic; NON-FATAL in 543d (dACC modifies RNG stream so byte-identical-trace concern from 543b doesn't apply). claim_ids=[ARC-062, MECH-309]. SD-029 stays dropped. experiment_purpose=evidence (architecturally load-bearing falsifier). Local smoke dry-run 2026-05-11 PASS wiring: 12 verdict lines (4 arms x 3 seeds), agent.gated_policy + agent.dacc toggle correctly per arm config, D-criteria printout works, ASCII-only verified, runner-conformance contract validated. Mac affinity matches 543b/c precedent (543b: 240 min Mac, 543c: 113 min Mac with short-circuit; 543d worst-case 540 min for 12 runs without short-circuit).

items.title: Forced uniform-random action warmup vs monostrategy collapse (training-loop diagnostic on V3-EXQ-550 entropy=0 finding)
items.note: Distinguishes data-narrowness (H1) vs substrate-collapse (H2) readings of the V3-EXQ-550 action_class_entropy=0.0 monostrategy finding. ARM_NORMAL = standard P0=40 train + P1=60 eval. ARM_WARMUP = identical except the first 50% of P0 (first 20 ep) overrides agent.select_action() with uniform-random one-hot actions; training data from the warmup IS collected normally. No ree_core modifications -- override is a script-level wrapper that discards the proposed action, stamps agent._last_action with a uniform-random one-hot, and returns that to env.step. 3 seeds [42, 7, 17] matching EXQ-550 / 543c cross-comparability. Env copied verbatim from V3-EXQ-543c ENV_KWARGS (size=12, bipartite SD-054 layout, hazard_food_attraction=0.7). Metric: P1 action_class_entropy. Pre-registered acceptance: PASS = ARM_WARMUP P1 entropy - ARM_NORMAL P1 entropy >= 0.10 AND ARM_WARMUP P1 entropy > 0.30 in >= 2/3 seeds. Three-row interpretation grid in script docstring + manifest evidence_direction_note: (i) PASS -> data-narrowness H1 supported; (ii) FAIL with both arms near zero -> substrate-collapse H2 supported (elevates urgency of V3-EXQ-551 proposer/evaluator diagnostic and ARC-062/MECH-309 cluster); (iii) mixed -> inconclusive. experiment_purpose=evidence; claim_ids=[] (training-loop diagnostic, not a specific architectural claim). Smoke 2026-05-11 PASS: override wrapper produces uniform action distribution across 5 classes (23/24/22/15/16 over 100 calls); 1-seed-x-1-ep-x-20-step smoke runs both arms end-to-end without crash (ARM_WARMUP P0 forced=11/11 actions overridden in the warmup ep). validate_experiments OK. machine_affinity=any (~120 min CPU on Mac for 6 cells x 100 ep x 200 steps with basic training; budget calibrated against 543c 240 min for 3 arms x 3 seeds x 108 ep + extra probe/multi-optimizer overhead this script does not carry).

items.title: Orthogonal CEM-candidate seeding proposer-fix (arm A; substrate-side flag use_orthogonal_cem_seeding)
items.note: First proposer-fix experiment for the V3-EXQ-550 / 551 / 551a / 552 action-class-entropy=0.0 monostrategy cliff. Tests whether structural CEM-candidate seeding (orthogonal basis instead of iid Gaussian over horizon x action_object_dim) lifts the entropy cliff. Substrate-side flag HippocampalConfig.use_orthogonal_cem_seeding (default False; bit-identical OFF). 309/309 contracts + 7/7 preflight PASS with master OFF + 5/5 new ortho contracts in tests/contracts/test_orthogonal_cem_seeding.py PASS with master ON (C1 surface, C2 OFF no-op, C3 ON diagnostics, C4 min-pairwise-L2 lift at seed level, C5 candidate count preserved). Two-arm ARM_IID vs ARM_ORTHO, 3 seeds [42, 7, 17] matching EXQ-550 / 551 / 552 cross-comparability. Env: CausalGridWorldV2 + SD-029 scheduled hazards verbatim from V3-EXQ-551 (size=10, num_hazards=2, num_resources=3, scheduled_external_hazard_enabled=True interval=50 prob=0.5 adjacent_only=True). No training (P0=20 ep at 30 ticks/ep; cliff exists at depth 0). Metrics: stage1_pairwise_l2_mean / stage1_min_pairwise_l2_mean / action_class_entropy / ortho_diag_last. Pre-registered acceptance: PASS = ARM_ORTHO stage1_pw > 1e-2 AND entropy > 0.30 in >=2/3 seeds AND entropy > ARM_IID entropy + 0.10 in >=2/3 seeds. Five-row interpretation grid in script docstring + manifest evidence_direction_note: R1 PASS (proposer seed-structure is cliff variable) / R2 PARTIAL_PASS (stage1 lifts but entropy ~= 0 -> downstream cliffs are independent blockers; route to V3-EXQ-551a stages 2/3 review) / R3 (stage1 < 1e-2 -> decoder collapse downstream of noise OR CEM elite-refit collapses orthogonal structure; diagnose action-object decoder or elite-refit) / R4 (ARM_IID matches ARM_ORTHO -> wiring broken) / R5 (mixed inconclusive; rerun at higher episode depth). experiment_purpose=evidence; claim_ids=[] intentional -- proposer-fix probe, claim attribution downstream of routing. Smoke 2026-05-11 PASS: 1 seed x 1 ep x 10 ticks per arm -- ARM_IID stage1_pw=3.56e-4 (matches EXQ-551 ~3e-4); ARM_ORTHO stage1_pw=2.30e-4 with ortho_diag={'use_orthogonal_cem_seeding': True, 'n_orthogonal_iters': 3, 'n_iid_fallback_candidates': 0} -- substrate firing as designed (3 CEM iters all ortho, no rank-deficient fallback). validate_experiments OK 1/1. Both smoke arms entropy=0 at smoke depth (expected; full-run is the load-bearing test). machine_affinity=any (~30 min CPU on Mac for 6 cells x 20 ep x 30 steps with no training).

items.title: MECH-307 consumer-conjunction threshold sweep (calibration diagnostic; supersedes V3-EXQ-540a FAIL)
items.note: Focused diagnostic threshold sweep superseding V3-EXQ-540a (2026-05-11T20:17:50Z FAIL on C2/C3). 540a confirmed C1 substrate-dissociation PASS across all three arms but FAILed C2 (conj_fire_rate=0 in ALL arms): the MECH-295 bridge consumer predicate (wanting > 0.6 AND liking > 0.3 AND positive_surprise > 0 AND z_beta > 0.6) never fires even when all four substrate counters are populated. 540b varies only the three consumer-side thresholds across 4 arms with substrate fully ON in every arm via use_mech307_conjunction=True. ARM_default 0.6/0.3/0.6 (reproduces 540a ARM_2_full), ARM_half 0.3/0.15/0.3, ARM_low 0.1/0.05/0.1, ARM_floor 0.01/0.005/0.01 (sanity arm; if this doesn't fire something is structurally wrong). Acceptance: C1 monotone-in-threshold fire-rate non-increasing across descending-threshold ordering (allows ties + 1e-4 tolerance); C2 at least one non-default arm fires conjunction in >= 2/3 seeds at floor rate 0.10. PASS routes to a 540c behavioural retest with the lowest-firing threshold arm. PARTIAL C1-PASS-C2-FAIL routes to structural read-side audit. C3 approach_commit_rate is OUT OF SCOPE here (540a metric saturated at 1.0 across all arms; separable metric-redesign session). claim_ids=[MECH-307, MECH-295]; experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Dry-run smoke 2026-05-11 PASS end-to-end: substrate fires identically in all 4 arms; conj_fire_rate=0.0 at dry-run scale of 6 ep (acceptance: C1 vacuously PASS via tied zeros, C2 FAIL as expected); real run at 70 ep/cell accumulates ~11x more writes.
